overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The player drives at high speed through intersections and under overpasses, encountering moderate traffic and making a left turn at a major intersection.

events.description: passing under first overpass structure, entering more enclosed urban space

agents.ego_description: accelerating to high speed on wet city streets, maintaining center lane position

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screen visible in the distance above the road
concrete and metal highway overpass spanning the roadway ahead
yellow painted concrete barriers separating lanes on the left side
yellow painted concrete barriers separating lanes on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a wide multi-lane city street at night in heavy rain. Digital billboards and overpass structures loom ahead as the vehicle accelerates. Yellow barriers line both sides of the wet asphalt road, and neon signs from distant buildings become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with digital advertising screens

events.description: entering covered area under overpass, lighting shifts to artificial overhead sources
beginning to slow down as vehicle approaches major intersection

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through covered roadway sections, navigating gentle curves under infrastructure

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving parallel in the left lane, maintaining similar speed

entered.detail: massive digital advertising display mounted underneath the overpass structure
thick concrete support columns for the overhead highway structure
thick concrete support columns for the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: Driving under heavy overpass infrastructure, the scene becomes more enclosed with reduced sky visibility. Large digital screens are mounted overhead between concrete support pillars. The road remains wet but is partially sheltered from the rain. A white sedan drives parallel in the left lane.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with yellow grid marking and crossing traffic

events.description: waiting at intersection for crossing traffic to clear before executing turn
executing sharp left turn at intersection, steering wheel turned hard left
completing left turn and entering new street with commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: slowing down to navigate a left turn at a major intersection, waiting for crossing vehicles to pass

notable_agents.action: blue truck crossing the intersection from right to left ahead of the ego vehicle
white sports car waiting at the intersection on the left side

entered.detail: yellow crosshatch pattern painted on the road surface indicating a no-stopping zone
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
tall buildings with bright neon signage and illuminated storefronts

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a major intersection marked with yellow grid patterns. After waiting for a blue truck to cross, the driver executes a sharp left turn. The scene transitions from the covered highway to an open intersection surrounded by commercial buildings with bright neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and moderate traffic

events.description: falling in behind a white delivery van, maintaining following distance
approaching another intersection with traffic lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating and maintaining steady speed on a commercial street, following a white van through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: white delivery van driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: tall buildings with bright neon signage lining the left side of the street
tall vertical digital advertising screen mounted on a building facade
yellow metal barriers separating the road from the sidewalk on the right

segments.scene_description: Driving along a commercial street lined with neon-lit buildings, the vehicle follows a white delivery van through moderate traffic. Pedestrians are visible walking on the sidewalks. The road is wet from the ongoing rain, and vertical digital billboards illuminate the right side of the street as the vehicle approaches another intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive through a rain-soaked metropolis, transitioning from an expansive highway under massive overpasses to a dense, neon-lit commercial district. It begins on a wide multi-lane street where the vehicle accelerates past yellow barriers toward looming digital billboards and concrete structures. As the camera moves beneath heavy overpass infrastructure, the environment becomes more enclosed and sheltered from the rain, passing a white sedan amidst overhead screens and support pillars. The scene then opens up as the driver waits for a blue truck before executing a sharp left turn at a yellow-gridded intersection, shifting the view from the covered highway to an open urban corridor. Finally, the vehicle follows a white delivery van through moderate traffic along a street lined with pedestrians and vertical digital billboards that illuminate the wet asphalt.
